response.overview: In Kerala, a young researcher named Advaith uncovers a mysterious clue that leads him toward an ancient secret hidden beyond recorded history. As he joins forces with Maya, Rahul, Neelan, Professor Varma, Veerendran, Professor Dashanana, and the enigmatic Aaryan, they begin unraveling a mystery that challenges everything they know about time, truth, and civilization. Meanwhile, the brilliant strategist Shakuni quietly sets events into motion from the shadows, marking the beginning of a much larger story.
response.tagline: Every mystery begins with one question.
response.title: THE NINTH ERA: PART 1

results.name: THE NINTH ERA | Official Trailer (2026) | Malayalam Mystery Thriller Series
